_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: ERK includes the two proteins ERK1 (44 kD) and ERK2 (42 kD), which are not separated at the level of resolution of these blots
details: Successfully detected total ERK protein including ERK1 (44 kD) and ERK2 (42 kD) in Western blot analysis
